summary: Implemented the full cron-tick board lifecycle: getProjectFieldIds now captures Pending Approval and Ready option IDs; init.mjs writes them into the tracking section; checkProjectBoard warns when field IDs are missing (cron-tick requires them); templates/PROJECT.md now includes the Tracking scaffold. Added 2 CLI integration tests verifying agt cron-tick exits 1 with 'not configured' when tracking section is absent.
